The local dedicated runner was retired on 2026-07-13, so this is not current environment evidence.

claims.claim: H07 has a reproducible synthetic corpus, candidate goldens, executable claim oracles, structured negative-control mappings, and a measured non-accepting Chrome baseline; this does not verify any H07 acceptance claim.
claims.source_of_truth: bun run test tests/media-harness.test.ts && bun run verify:media --suite baseline --no-accept
claims.old_failure: the H07 commands existed but the H00 manifest still declared their oracles absent, top-level claim controls had no executable scenario mapping, and external WKWebView/package JSON was trusted after checking only status plus fixture hash
claims.new_gate: five claim commands bind the exact media implementation set and canonical scenario-control mutations; external evidence must satisfy source/runtime/policy/fixture lineage, exact WK cell denominator or recomputed package distributions, and independently hashed artifacts
claims.evidence_subject_basis: origin/main parent used for the reconciliation worktree; the described oracle changes are unmerged until the reconciliation commit lands
claims.post_integration_result: baseline_only run 0916846f-69ba-47ca-8c10-596692ad3487: 12-fixture manifest 7e8a9684ccd86de9af5564636401f424e5c3709be4eca9ad305e57987aa81cd5; headless Chrome live/resilience passed; 3 warmups plus 15 fresh processes x 300 samples recorded (max per-run p95 0.040 ms, max sample 0.165 ms). Render/parity remain candidate_only; live.wkwebview requires the H05 guest provider; performance.release-package requires H08; all three policies remain draft and unapproved.
